meta.title: CodeLeaf | AI Implementation Partner
meta.description: CodeLeaf is an AI implementation partner that builds production-ready AI systems — from LLM integration and AI agents to workflow automation and custom ML development.

hero.tagline: We Build AI-Powered Systems That Actually Ship

aiServices.title: AI
aiServices.description: End-to-end AI implementation — from strategy and LLM selection to production deployment and ongoing optimization.

items.title: AI Strategy & Roadmapping
items.description: We assess your business processes, identify high-ROI AI opportunities, and build a phased roadmap from pilot to scale.

items.title: Custom AI Development
items.description: Bespoke AI models and pipelines tailored to your data, compliance requirements, and performance targets.

items.title: LLM Integration
items.description: Production-grade LLM integrations with RAG, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and guardrails for reliable outputs.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Intelligent automation of document processing, data extraction, approval workflows, and repetitive business tasks.

items.title: AI Agent Development
items.description: Autonomous and semi-autonomous AI agents that handle customer support, research, scheduling, and complex multi-step tasks.

capabilities.heading: What we
capabilities.description: End-to-end technical solutions that transform businesses.

items.title: AI Integration
items.description: Production LLM systems, RAG pipelines, vector search, and AI agents that deliver measurable business outcomes.

items.description: Full-stack apps that scale. React, Next.js, Node.js.

items.title: API Architecture

items.title: Cloud Infrastructure

items.title: Security First

items.title: System Design
items.description: Complex systems made simple. Any scale.

projects.name: TaxApp
projects.description: Modern tax preparation portal with guided filing and secure document uploads.
projects.aiOutcome: Before: Manual data entry from W-2s and receipts caused errors and delays. After: OCR + AI extracts data from uploaded documents with 98.5% accuracy, pre-filling returns and flagging anomalies.

projects.name: Chroma Care Labs
projects.description: Clinical lab management platform with automated reporting and compliance tracking.
projects.aiOutcome: Before: Lab technicians manually transcribed test results and drafted patient reports. After: NLP pipelines auto-generate structured reports, flag critical values, and route alerts to clinicians.

testimonials.title: What our
testimonials.description: Trusted by businesses across Canada for reliable, innovative AI solutions.

items.quote: The OCR and anomaly detection CodeLeaf built into TaxApp eliminated data entry errors and cut our processing time per return from 45 minutes to under 10. That's a game-changer during tax season.
items.author: Aisha Patel

items.quote: Their AI report generation reduced our transcription workload by 60% and caught critical values we previously missed. CodeLeaf understood healthcare compliance from day one.
items.author: Dr. Rebecca Torres

items.quote: CodeLeaf turned our legacy inventory system into a real-time AI-powered platform. Demand forecasting accuracy improved by 35% and stockouts dropped by half.
items.author: Marcus Chen

trustSignals.title: Why
trustSignals.description: Enterprise-ready AI implementation with security, process, and expertise you can count on.

articles.title: How Canadian Businesses Can Start with AI in 2026
articles.excerpt: A practical framework for identifying your first AI use case, choosing between off-the-shelf and custom solutions, and building internal buy-in.

articles.title: LLM vs. Traditional ML: Which is Right for Your Use Case?
articles.excerpt: When to use large language models versus classical machine learning — and why the wrong choice can cost you 6 months and $100K.

philosophy.title: We don't just write code.
philosophy.description: Based in Edmonton, Alberta, CodeLeaf serves clients across Canada as an AI implementation partner. We navigate LLM selection, prompt engineering, RAG architecture, vector databases, AI agents, and compliance — then build the production software around it. Like a leaf, every project needs the right environment to thrive. We provide the expertise, care, and technical foundation for your AI initiatives to flourish.

contact.title: Let's build your AI system
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your AI challenge. We'll architect the solution.
